title: Combining useReducer with Context
description: Create a mini Redux-like store using useReducer and Context.

slides.title: Global State with useReducer + Context 🌍
slides.content:
# A Simple Store

When you need to share complex state across many components, you can combine useReducer with Context.

## Pattern

1. Create a context.
2. Create a provider component that holds the reducer state and dispatch.
3. Provide the state and dispatch via context.
4. Consume them in child components.

slides.title: Todo App Example
slides.content: Let's build a global todo list:

quizData.question: Why would you combine useReducer with Context?

options.text: To share state and dispatch across many components without prop drilling

quizData.explanation: Context makes the state and dispatch available to any component in the tree, avoiding prop drilling.
